task: Allow BookedTrip Excel imports to accept short painted container codes such as HCVT0002.
acceptanceCriteria: Legacy and preview BookedTrip imports normalize and accept four-letter/four-digit identifiers.
ISO 6346 identifiers remain supported without weakening legacy validation.
Malformed and overlong identifiers remain rejected.
publicContracts: BookedTrip Excel preview and commit accept HCVT0002-style short codes.
Malformed direct commit container identifiers return request validation errors.
scoutSummary: The driver/OCR path already used shared container-identifier validation, while BookedTrip import stages retained ISO-only regular expressions and validators. Reconciliation normalizes identifiers and is length-agnostic.
